description: Golden reference data for FX spot date calculations. These dates have been verified against ISDA conventions, Bloomberg FXFA function, and vendor holiday calendars. Any changes must be documented with rationale and source references.

metadata.convention: ISDA FX Settlement - Joint Business Day Counting
notes: FX spot follows T+N joint business days convention
A day is business only if it is business on BOTH currency calendars
Standard spot lag is T+2 for most pairs (T+1 for some like USD/CAD)
Settlement calendars depend on currency pair, not exchange

legacy_behavior_changes.description: Phase 2 implementation changed from calendar days to joint business days

example.legacy_method: trade_date + 2 calendar days = 2023-12-31 (Sunday) -> adjust to 2024-01-01 (WRONG: New Year's Day)
example.correct_method: trade_date + 2 joint business days = skip weekend + Jan 1 holiday -> 2024-01-03
example.impact: Spot dates near holidays may shift by 1-3 days compared to legacy implementation

test_cases.description: USD/EUR around New Year's Day 2024 (joint closure)
business_day_breakdown: 2024-01-01: Skip (New Year's Day - joint closure on NYSE and TARGET2)
2024-01-03: Count as business day 2 (Wednesday) - SPOT DATE
test_cases.rationale: New Year's Day is a joint holiday. Joint business day counting skips it correctly.
test_cases.verified_against: ISDA calendar, Bloomberg FXFA, ECB TARGET2 calendar

business_day_breakdown: 2024-12-24: Count as business day 1 (Tuesday - both open)
2024-12-26: Skip (Boxing Day - TARGET2 closed, NYSE may be open but skip for joint)
2024-12-27: Count as business day 2 (Friday) - SPOT DATE
test_cases.rationale: Christmas is joint closure. Boxing Day closes TARGET2 so joint skip even if NYSE open.

test_cases.description: GBP/JPY around UK Early May Bank Holiday and Japan Golden Week
business_day_breakdown: 2025-05-02: Count as business day 1 (Friday - both open)
2025-05-03: Skip (Saturday - also Constitution Day in Japan)
2025-05-04: Skip (Sunday - also Greenery Day in Japan)
2025-05-05: Skip (Children's Day JPX closed + UK Early May Bank Holiday GBLO closed - joint closure)
2025-05-06: Skip (Substitute holiday for Greenery Day - JPX closed)
2025-05-07: Count as business day 2 (Wednesday) - SPOT DATE
test_cases.rationale: UK bank holiday on first Monday of May (May 5). Japan's Golden Week includes May 5 (Children's Day) and May 6 (substitute holiday for Greenery Day which fell on Sunday May 4). Joint closure on May 5, JPX-only on May 6.
test_cases.verified_against: Bank of England calendar, JPX holiday schedule, Japan substitute holiday rules

test_cases.description: GBP/JPY around UK Spring Bank Holiday (last Monday in May)
business_day_breakdown: 2025-05-26: Skip (UK Spring Bank Holiday - GBLO closed)
2025-05-27: Count as business day 2 (Tuesday) - SPOT DATE
test_cases.rationale: UK Spring Bank Holiday on last Monday of May.

business_day_breakdown: 2025-07-03: Count as business day 1 (Thursday - both open)
2025-07-07: Count as business day 2 (Monday) - SPOT DATE
test_cases.rationale: July 4 closes NYSE but not GBLO. Joint skip required.
test_cases.verified_against: NYSE calendar, Bank of England calendar

test_cases.description: USD/GBP around MLK Day (third Monday in January)
business_day_breakdown: 2025-01-22: Count as business day 2 (Wednesday) - SPOT DATE
test_cases.rationale: MLK Day closes NYSE but not GBLO. Joint skip required.

business_day_breakdown: 2024-12-24: Count as business day 2 (Tuesday - both open)
test_cases.rationale: Extended holiday period with multiple consecutive non-business days. Tests robustness of joint counting.

business_day_breakdown: 2024-01-17: Count as business day 2 (Wednesday) - SPOT DATE
test_cases.rationale: Null calendars use weekends-only. Simple business day counting with no holiday skips.

nyse.name: New York Stock Exchange
key_holidays: Martin Luther King Jr. Day (3rd Monday in January)
nyse.notes: NYSE observes federal US holidays plus Good Friday. When a holiday falls on Saturday, observed Friday. When on Sunday, observed Monday.

target2.name: TARGET2 (Trans-European Automated Real-time Gross settlement Express Transfer system)
target2.notes: TARGET2 is closed on Saturdays, Sundays, and specific public holidays across the Eurozone. No substitute days observed.

gblo.name: London Stock Exchange / Bank of England
key_holidays: Early May Bank Holiday (1st Monday in May)
Spring Bank Holiday (last Monday in May)
Summer Bank Holiday (last Monday in August)
gblo.notes: UK bank holidays. When a holiday falls on weekend, substitute Monday observed.

jpx.name: Japan Exchange Group / Tokyo Stock Exchange
key_holidays: Coming of Age Day (2nd Monday in January)
Respect for the Aged Day (3rd Monday in September)
jpx.notes: Japan observes multiple public holidays. Golden Week (late Apr-early May) includes several consecutive holidays. When a holiday falls on Sunday, following Monday is substitute holiday.

change_log.changes: Initial golden file creation for Phase 2 FX settlement refactor
change_log.author: Phase 2 Implementation
change_log.rationale: Establish baseline expected dates for joint business day counting implementation. All dates verified against vendor calendars and ISDA conventions.
